# Changing the App Theme (Dark Mode)

Source: https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000427001

Helium supports Light, Dark, and System-synced themes. You can change the theme at any time from [**Settings**](https://app.heliumedu.com/settings).

## How to Change the Theme

  1. Open [**Settings**](https://app.heliumedu.com/settings)
  2. At the top of the Settings screen, find the three-icon theme toggle
  3. Tap your preferred option:
     * **Light** (sun icon) — always uses the light theme
     * **Dark** (moon icon) — always uses the dark theme
     * **System** (auto-brightness icon) — follows your current device's appearance setting

The theme change takes effect immediately and is saved to your account, so it will apply across all your devices.

---

## Helium Classic

Theme selection is not available in Helium Classic. The interface is always displayed in light mode.

_Helium Classic will remain available through at least Summer 2026._
